Ed is a serving Army officer in the Devices Management Directorate, Army Training Support Center. He has been doing performance technology for over 16 years, even though he didn't know it was called that until Dan Raymond told him (and made him read Mager, Pipe, Harless, Kaufman, and Dick). Ed is working on his doctorate in HRD at The George Washington University
